Join the Cookbook Creator Platform

Avram Salzmann Recipe Developer · 84 recipes
WHY COOKBOOK

A permanent home for your recipes. Where people actually cook them.

REACH

Beyond the algorithm

Access 1M+ active app users already in meal-planning mode. People who are deciding what to cook tonight, not just scrolling.

SERVE

Real kitchen data

See who cooked, rated, and saved your recipes. The feedback loop social media never gives you.

CURATE

One recipe. Every market.

Publish once. Reach subscribers across US, UK, Australia, and New Zealand.

HOW IT WORKS

Zero extra work. We convert your existing content.

1
📷

Share your videos

Link your existing recipe videos from TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube. That's all we need.

2
⚡

We convert them

We turn your video content into structured step-by-step recipe cards with ingredients, timings, and photos.

3
🍽

People cook them

Your recipes go live in the app where 1M+ users browse, save, and cook in real kitchens.

4
💰

You earn

Monetization tied to cooking activity. Real meals made, real attribution, real income.

WHO CAN JOIN

Passionate creators wanted

Professional quality, originality, and range valued over follower counts.

📱

🏠

📚

REFERRAL PROGRAM

Grow together. Get rewarded.

The best kitchens are built by chefs who lift each other up. Refer creators you believe in — we'll reward you both.

Refer a creator
🤝

Recommend peers

Feature up to 5 favorite creators on your profile. Cross-promote organically.

💰

$2,000 shared reward

When a creator you refer hits 1,000 app downloads: you get $1,000, they get $1,000. Everyone wins.

🎁

Monthly creator bonus

Top referring creators get featured placement, exclusive merch drops, and early access to new features.

Frequently asked questions

What is the Cookbook Creator Platform?

A permanent home for your recipes inside the HelloFresh app. We convert your existing video content into structured step-by-step recipe cards — searchable, saveable, and accessible to 1M+ users who are actively deciding what to cook. Think of it as the anti-algorithm: your recipes never get buried.

Do I need to create new content?

No. Zero extra work required. We take your existing video recipes and convert them into structured recipe cards with ingredients, steps, and timings. You keep creating on your platforms — we handle the rest.

How is this different from social media saves?

Social saves are where recipes go to die. On Cookbook, every save leads to a cook. Users open recipes in active cooking mode — with step-by-step instructions, timers, and ingredient lists. You get visibility into who actually made your food, not just who double-tapped.

How do I make money?

Monetization is tied to cooking activity — real meals made from your recipes. We're piloting this model in the US with a revenue structure that rewards actual impact, not vanity metrics. Our partnerships team works directly with each creator on terms.

Does it cost anything?

Free platform access during the pilot phase for selected creators. No hidden fees, no revenue share from your other channels.

What are the selection criteria?

We value recipe quality and originality over follower counts. If people watch your content and want to cook what you make, you're exactly who we're looking for.
